debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : Fin n → ℝ
⊢ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i + x j|

failed_attempts: simpa using IMO2021P2.inequality (n := n) x

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
    (IMO2021P2.imo2021_p2 (n := n) (x := x))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (IMO2021P2.result (n := n) (x := fun i => -x i))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (IMO2021P2.imo2021_p2 (n := n) x)

  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (IMO2021P2.result (n := n) (x := fun i => -x i))
simpa using IMO2021P2.result (n := n) x

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using

classical
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, abs_sub_comm] using

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
    (IMO2021P2.result (n := n) (x := fun i => -x i))

classical
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, abs_sub_comm] using
    (IMO2021P2.result (n := n) (x := fun i => x i))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
    (by
      classical
      simpa [Finset.sum_sigma', Finset.sum_product] using
        (show (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + -x j|)
            ≤ (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j|) from by
              have h :
                  (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + -x j|)
                    = (∑ i : Fin n, ∑ j : Fin n, √|x i + x j|) := by
                        classical
                        simpa using
                          (Finset.sum_bij (fun i : Fin n => i) (by intro i hi; simpa)
                            (by intro i hi; simp)
                            (by intro i hi; refine ⟨i, hi, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> simp)
                            (by intro a ha b hb hab; simpa using hab))
              simpa [h]))

simpa using IMO2021P2.result (n := n) x

classical
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, abs_sub_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (sum_le_sum (fun i => sum_le_sum (fun j => by
      simpa [abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          have : (x i - x j) = (x j + (-x i)) := by ring
          -- rewrite via equality then use commutativity of addition inside abs
          -- but simplest: direct simp
          simp [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, abs_sub_comm])))))
simpa using IMO2021P2.result (n := n) x

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
    (IMO2021P2.imo2021_p2 (n := n) x)
simpa using IMO2021P2

classical
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
    (sum_le_sum fun i ↦
      (sum_le_sum fun j ↦
        (by
          simpa [abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
            (by
              have h :
                  |x i - x j| = |x i + (-x j)| := by
                    simp [sub_eq_add_neg]
              simp [h]))))

simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
    (IMO2021P2.result (n := n) (x := fun i => -x i))
simpa using imo2021_p2 x

classical
  have h :
      (∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |x i - x j| : ℝ) =
        ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |(-x i) + x j| := by
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
    intro i hi
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
    intro j hj
    have : (-x i) + x j = x j - x i := by ring
    simp [this, abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
  calc
    ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |x i - x j|
        = ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |(-x i) + x j| := h
    _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |(-x i) + x j| + ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |x i + x j| := by
          linarith
    _ = ∑ i, ∑ j, (Real.sqrt |x i + x j| + Real.sqrt |(-x i) + x j|) := by
          simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.add_sum, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
    _ = ∑ i, ∑ j, (Real.sqrt |x i + x j| + Real.sqrt |x i - x j|) := by
          refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
          intro i hi
          refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
          intro j hj
          simp [sub_eq_add_neg, abs_sub_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
    _ ≥ ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |x i + x j| := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.sqrt |x i - x j| := by
            exact Finset.sum_nonneg (fun i hi =>
              Finset.sum_nonneg (fun j hj => Real.sqrt_nonneg _))
          linarith
